news.headline: WeRide's stock rises despite Q4 revenue dip. Q4 revenue: RMB140.8M ($19.3M), product revenue: RMB51.7M ($7.1M); Net loss: RMB245.5M ($33.6M).
news.summary: WeRide Inc. (NASDAQ: WRD) stocks saw an increase in trading on Friday following the release of their fourth-quarter financial report. The total revenue for the quarter was RMB140.8 million ($19.3 million), a slight decrease from RMB144.8 million reported in the same period in 2023. The company experienced a surge in fourth-quarter product revenue, reaching RMB51.7 million ($7.1 million), attributed to the strong sales performance of their robotaxis, robosweepers, and robovans. Conversely, service revenue dropped to RMB89.1 million ($12.2 million) due to decreased income from ADAS research and development services. WeRide reported a non-IFRS adjusted net loss of RMB245.5 million ($33.6 million) for the quarter, a significant increase from the RMB115.7 million loss reported in the prior-year quarter. The financial figures were as of December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Angeles Investments named 2025 Greenwich Best Investment Consultant for 8th year, managing $6.8B in assets and advising $31.5B.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Santa Monica, California, Angeles Investments, a diverse investment management company, was acknowledged by Coalition Greenwich as a top Investment Consultant for 2025. The firm manages around $6.8 billion in discretionary assets and oversees $31.5 billion in advisory assets.

University of Michigan Sentiment fell to the lowest since November 2022 & long-run inflation expectations hit a 32-year high.
Heartland Express, Inc. declares $0.02/share quarterly dividend, totaling $1.6M for 78.7M shares, marking 87th consecutive payout.
news.summary: Heartland Express, Inc. based in North Liberty, Iowa, declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per share for shareholders of record on March 25, 2025. The dividend, totaling approximately $1.6 million, will be disbursed on April 4, 2025, to the Company's 78.7 million common stockholders. This dividend marks the eighty-seventh consecutive quarterly cash dividend issued by the company, bringing the total cash dividends paid to $556.8 million, which includes four special dividends distributed since the inception of the dividend program in the third quarter of 2003.

news.headline: LILYSILK launches exclusive Capsule Collection with Elizabeth Stewart, Hollywood stylist.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, renowned silk brand LILYSILK launched the LILYSILK X Elizabeth Stewart Capsule Collection in partnership with a well-known Hollywood stylist. LILYSILK aims to promote sustainability and inspire individuals to live vibrant lives. This exclusive collection offers a range of luxurious silk products for consumers to enjoy.

news.headline: GiGi's Playhouse and Harry Moon Books release "GiGi's Journey" book, promoting Down Syndrome inclusivity.
news.summary: Yesterday in Chicago, GiGi's Playhouse, known as the sole network of Down Syndrome Achievement Centers, revealed the launch of "GiGi's Journey" by Harry Moon, in collaboration with Harry Moon Books, a popular children's series. This exciting partnership brings forth a new book aimed at raising awareness and promoting inclusivity. The book release aims to impact a wide audience, with GiGi's Playhouse reaching a significant number of individuals.

news.headline: WTWH Healthcare announces 2025 Aspect Awards winners with nearly 50 submissions across various healthcare categories.
news.summary: In Cleveland on March 14, 2025, WTWH Healthcare, a subsidiary of WTWH Media, unveiled the recipients of the 2025 Aspect Awards. This year, the awards celebrated achievements in the fields of Behavioral Health, Home Health & Home Care, Hospice & Palliative Care, and Senior Housing & Senior Care. The competition attracted close to 50 entries, highlighting the growth and excellence in various sectors of healthcare.

news.headline: Inventor from Frisco, Texas creates UTV/ATV Fully Enclosed Cover to protect vehicles, patented as DAL-608.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 14, 2025, an inventor from Frisco, Texas shared the creation of the UTV Fully Enclosed Cover aimed at safeguarding ATVs or UTVs from outdoor elements. The inventor explained that the innovative cover was designed to enhance protection for vehicles when parked outside. This invention is expected to provide comprehensive coverage to keep the vehicle dry and shielded.

news.headline: Bedsure's Breescape™ brand launches reversible cooling comforter with BlendTek™ tech for hot sleepers. #temperaturecontrol
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Bedsure, recognized as the leading online bedding brand in the United States, introduced Breescape™, a new specialized brand catering to individuals who struggle with overheating while sleeping. This collection showcases the innovative BlendTek™ technology and is highlighted by the Breescape Reversible Cooling Comforter. The product aims to provide relief for hot sleepers looking for a comfortable night's rest. The company has emphasized its commitment to addressing the needs of overheatingsleepers through this new launch.

news.headline: Stock market sees sharp losses due to Trump tariffs, despite tame inflation. Major indexes affected.
news.summary: Last week, the stock market experienced significant declines due to the escalation of Trump's tariffs, overshadowing the low inflation rates. The major indexes recorded sharp losses, reflecting a stock market correction triggered by the tariffs imposed by Trump. Despite the inflation remaining subdued, investors reacted by selling off their holdings. This news highlights the impact of trade tensions on the market, with important numbers including the notable decrease in major indexes and the persistence of low inflation rates.

news.headline: Comcast and local leaders bring digital literacy resources to Augusta post-Hurricane Helene. ATLANTA, March 14, 2025.
news.summary: This week in Augusta, Georgia, Comcast and local community leaders have resumed their efforts to provide essential digital literacy resources following Hurricane Helene. The initiative showcases a strong dedication to the city's recovery post-disaster. This return comes after ongoing restoration work to rebuild the area affected by the hurricane. The partnership highlights the commitment to supporting the community during the rebuilding process.

news.headline: The Palace, A Luxury Collection Hotel in Madrid reopens after restoration combining modern and historic elements.
news.summary: A well-known city landmark has recently become part of The Luxury Collection, after undergoing a careful restoration that blends modern sophistication with historical charm. High-resolution images are available for download. The announcement was made in Bethesda, Md. on March 14, 2025 by The Luxury Collection, a division of Marriott Bonvoy.

news.headline: LG presented accessible smart solutions at CSUN Assistive Technology Conference, aiming for a 'Better Life for All' in the U.S. market.
news.summary: LG, a prominent exhibitor at the CSUN Assistive Technology Conference, showcased groundbreaking accessibility innovations in Anaheim, California on March 14, 2025. These innovations aim to improve the quality of life for all individuals. The event highlighted LG's commitment to inclusivity and featured new products tailored for the U.S. market. This demonstrates LG's dedication to creating technology that enhances accessibility and usability for everyone.

news.headline: TÜV Rheinland gives cTUVus certifications to TeraHive for Smart Switch & Energy Suite, Mar 14, 2025.
news.summary: In Boxborough, Massachusetts, on March 14, 2025, TÜV Rheinland granted cTUVus certifications to TeraHive, a company focusing on Intelligent Energy Management solutions. The certifications were given to the TeraHive Smart Switch and TeraHive Energy Suite, following U.S. standards.

news.headline: Florida Southern College names Brittany Behrens as the Maida Badcock Pou Endowed Chair in Nursing Simulation, thanks to a gift from alumna Ebbie Sue Pou Doherty.
news.summary: In Lakeland, Florida, on March 14, 2025, Florida Southern College revealed the appointment of Brittany Behrens, MSN, RN, CNE, CHSE, as the recipient of the prestigious Maida Badcock Pou Endowed Chair in Nursing Simulation. The acclaimed position was established through a generous donation from former student Ebbie Sue Pou Doherty.

news.headline: Alice P. Frazier of BCT-Bank of Charles Town is ICBA Chairman-elect for 2025-26; term starts soon.
news.summary: In Charles Town, West Virginia on March 14, 2025, BCT-Bank of Charles Town, or The Community's Bank, shared that Alice P. Frazier, President and CEO, has been appointed chairman-elect of the Independent Community Bankers of America (ICBA) for the 2025-26 term. The announcement was made under OTC symbol PTBS. Frazier's new role is set to commence soon.

news.headline: The Predictive Index at Transform 2025 in Mass discusses future of HR, showcases insights on disruptive forces.
news.summary: In Westwood, Massachusetts, The Predictive Index presented at Transform 2025, highlighting the strategic outlook for HR. The event showcased key insights into the factors set to disrupt the future of work. This presentation emphasized the importance of adapting to emerging trends and technologies in order to stay competitive in the evolving landscape. The event attracted a significant number of attendees, with over 500 HR professionals in attendance to gain valuable knowledge and insights to navigate the changing HR landscape.

news.headline: AeroMech ODA grants STC for Starlink on Citation X/X+ aircraft for high-speed internet connectivity.
news.summary: In Everett, Washington, AeroMech ODA has recently issued the FAA Supplemental Type Certificate (STC) for Starlink high-speed internet connectivity on Citation X and X+ aircraft. This certification enables these aircraft models to access fast internet services while in flight, enhancing the overall in-flight experience. This development marks a significant milestone for the aviation industry, as it provides Citation X and X+ aircraft with advanced technology capabilities.

news.headline: Commonwealth designates March 17, 2025 as Profound Autism Day; National Autism Center commends state's efforts.
news.summary: The National Autism Center at May Institute commends state leadership for their efforts in recognizing and advocating for the unique needs of this community. Located in Randolph, Massachusetts, on March 14, 2025, the Center praised the state's commitment to shining a light on individuals with severe autism. This initiative aims to raise awareness and provide support for those with profound autism, emphasizing the importance of addressing their specific requirements.

news.headline: VeeMost Technologies (OTC: $GDVM) announces growth strategy update, FINRA approval, shares commitment to long-term shareholder value.
news.summary: Red Bank, NJ - March 14, 2025 - VeeMost Technologies Inc. (OTC: $GDVM) announced significant progress in its growth strategies and government contracts, aiming to enhance shareholder value. The company is dedicated to providing comprehensive updates on its development initiatives.

news.headline: Agnė Duksienė resigns from the Management Board of Šiaulių Bankas AB.
news.summary: Siauliu Bankas AB recently received notice from Agne Duksiene regarding her decision to step down as a member of the Bank's Management Board.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was stated that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.3%, indicating a positive trend in the job market. The total number of new jobs created in the last month was reported to be 250,000, surpassing analysts' expectations. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the last quarter was revised to 3.5%, showing a healthy expansion in the economy. It is speculated that these indicators point towards a strengthening labor market and overall economic growth.

news.headline: University Michigan 5 Yr Inflation Prelim Actual 3.9% (Forecast 3.4%, Previous 3.5%)
ECB's Escriva: We need to see further easing in services inflation.

Women-led C-Days in Spain, ICBC in Europe, diverse speakers, state of market; California extends hemp ban, UN classifies HHC as Schedule II drug; Blueberries Medical $730k funding, Wana Brands THC expansion, Tilray's retail expansion; Cresco Labs, Village Farms financial reports.
news.summary: In Spain, C-Days featured an all-women keynote lineup in the cannabis industry, showcasing women's leadership. International Cannabis Business Conference (ICBC) highlighted Europe's growing cannabis market attracting serious players. Corporate news included Blueberries Medical securing $730,000, Wana Brands expanding THC beverages, and Tilray's Runner's High beer retail expansion. California extended its ban on intoxicating hemp, the United Nations classified HHC as a Schedule II drug, and a federal memo revealed marijuana as a "controversial" topic. Financial reports from Cresco Labs, Village Farms International, and others offered market trend insights. Significant events include Spannabis and ICBC Berlin, with upcoming Benzinga Cannabis Capital Conference in Chicago on June 8-10. Key numbers: Blueberries Medical raised $730,000, California extended hemp ban for 90 days, UN classified HHC as Schedule II drug.

news.headline: Yalla Group reports 12.2% revenue growth in Q4, profit up 10%. Launching 2 new games, targets MENA market expansion.
news.summary: Yalla Group Ltd., a Middle Eastern social media company, had a strong fourth quarter with 12.2% revenue growth and a 10% profit increase due to cost controls and improved user monetization. The company is testing two self-developed mid-core games that could contribute to revenue in the second half of the year. Yalla is focusing on AI integration for efficiency and user experience enhancements. The company is expanding into mid- and hardcore gaming to diversify its user base, with high net margins around 40%. Yalla is organizing offline gaming events across the MENA region to establish itself as a major player in the regional gaming space.

news.headline: ECB's Escriva: Risks to the baseline scenario are very significant.
ECB's Escriva: It is hard to assess net tariff effect on inflation.
ECB's Escriva: We must assess demand effect from fiscal spending.
ECB's Escriva: The April decision is unclear, so we must keep options open.
ECB's Escriva: Tariffs may hurt demand and confidence.
NAT's Non-Executive Vice Chairman, Alexander Hansson, purchases additional shares in the company.
Saab gets $37 million order for more Live Training equipment from U.S. Marine Corps.
news.summary: Saab, based in Stockholm, announced on March 14, 2025, that they were granted a contract modification by the U.S. Marine Corps. This contract is for additional Marine Corps Training Instrumentation Systems (MCTIS) equipment and has a value of USD $37 million (SEK 375 million). The deliveries for this equipment are scheduled to be completed within a specified timeframe.

news.headline: German Greens Party Leader Hasselmann: We expect to be able to vote on additional 3 bln euros for Ukraine in the budget committee next Tuesday.
Third Avenue Real Estate Value Fund wins Best Global Real Estate Fund honors at 2025 LSEG Lipper Funds Awards in US.
news.summary: Third Avenue Management LLC revealed that the Third Avenue Real Estate Value Fund attained recognition at the 2025 LSEG Lipper Funds Awards in the United States. The Fund was honored as the Best Global Real Estate Fund Over Three Years and the Best Global Real Estate Fund Over Five Years. The Lipper Fund Awards, known for over 30 years for highlighting robust risk-adjusted performance, showcased the Fund's outstanding achievements.

news.headline: Nasdaq gains 1.5%, Ultima Beauty's upbeat results. Dow at 40,939.35, NASDAQ at 17,562.15, S&P 500 at 5,573.84.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. saw a positive start today, with the Nasdaq Composite showing a notable increase of approximately 1.5% on Friday. At the opening of the market on Friday, the Dow rose by 0.31% to 40,939.35, while the NASDAQ surged by 1.50% to 17,562.15. The S&P 500 also experienced growth, climbing by 0.95% to 5,573.84. Information technology shares were among the top performers, gaining 1.9% on Friday, while consumer staples shares saw a slight decline of 0.5% in trading that day. Ulta Beauty, Inc. (NASDAQ: ULTA) reported better-than-expected financial results for the fourth quarter, projecting revenue between $11.5 billion to $11.6 billion for fiscal year 2025, slightly below estimates of $11.67 billion. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Stock markets rebound as Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq open stronger on last day of turbulent week.
German Greens' Droege: We have not yet done a trial vote with lawmakers.
Permanent Portfolio Funds, managed by Pacific Heights Asset Management, won three 2025 LSEG Lipper Fund Awards.
news.summary: In San Francisco on March 14, 2025, Pacific Heights Asset Management, LLC, the investment adviser for the Permanent Portfolio Family of Funds, proudly revealed that its main fund, the Permanent Portfolio®, has been honored with three prestigious 2025 LSEG Lipper Fund Awards. These accolades recognize the fund's unwavering performance and success.

news.headline: US Envoy Witkoff had a long meeting with Putin last night in Moscow -Source Briefed on the Matter.
